title: API Resources, Object Identity, Schemas, Desired State, and Status · API Object Lens: K8s Group Version Kind Resource
summary: A shared cluster rejects and defaults manifests differently across supported API versions while stale status leads a release team toward the wrong repair. Planned artifact: Add and verify the k8s group version kind resource increment in versioned API object contract. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Resolve API group, version, kind, plural resource, scope, endpoint, and served or stored version for a concrete object.
Capture client, server, API discovery, context, cluster identity, node, runtime, add-on, feature-state, and support-window evidence before mutation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: k8s-worked-k8s-api-objects-schema-status-3
  - competency: k8s-worked-k8s-api-objects-schema-status-3
    artifact: api-object.yaml
    decision: worked k8s api objects schema status 3
    environment: shared multi-tenant cluster under Restricted Pod Security
    fault-injection: drop one metrics series during an autoscaling surge
    retained-proof: accessible incident timeline with causal regression evidence
    case-key: worked3
    change: |
      apiVersion: apps/v1
      kind: Deployment
      metadata:
      name: status-api
      spec:
      replicas: 3
      status-evidence: observedGeneration-and-conditions
    verify: kubectl explain deployment.spec --api-version=apps/v1 && kubectl get deployment status-api -o json
    failure: Reject valid-YAML-only evidence, stale status, unknown fields, or an API selected without feature-state and deprecation review.
    repair: Use live discovery and schema, separate spec from status, compare generation with observedGeneration, and preserve object UID and resourceVersion.
content.caption: Runnable Kubernetes object and transfer-evidence contract example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.
